8033.one_line_summary: Multi-agent councils resolve queries using commit-reveal-judge flows with bonded incentives.
8033.notes: Introduces role separation between Info Agents (submitters) and Judge Agents (aggregators). Dispute mechanism and reputation integration with ERC-8004 are optional. Core flow uses commit-reveal-judge pattern.

8034.one_line_summary: Royalty distribution for Referable NFTs supporting multiple recipients and DAG-based propagation.
8034.notes: Standalone from ERC-2981. Includes EIP-712 signature-based configuration. Primary royalty cap of 10% (1000 bps). Reference depth limited to ≤3 to control gas costs.

8040.one_line_summary: Overlay interface for ESG asset tokenization with lifecycle states and attestation recording.
8040.notes: Metadata bound via SHA3-512 digests. Post-quantum ready. Lifecycle: issued → audited → retired (irreversible). Works with ERC-20, ERC-721, ERC-1155.

8041.one_line_summary: Fixed-supply collections of Agent NFTs registered in ERC-8004 with mint number tracking.
8041.notes: Supports multiple collections per agent via ERC-8119 parameterized keys. Collection metadata stored in agent's onchain metadata. Mint numbers 1-indexed and immutable.

8042.one_line_summary: Standardizes diamond storage pattern using keccak256 hash of human-readable identifiers for storage locations.
8042.notes: ASCII-restricted identifiers recommended. Simpler alternative to ERC-7201 for new projects. Formula: keccak256(identifier). Backward compatible with existing diamond storage deployments.

8047.one_line_summary: DAG-based token enabling hierarchical traceability with O(1) forensic enforcement for compliance.
8047.notes: Inherits from ERC-1155 and ERC-5615. Soft-delete burning preserves lineage. Token Policy Enforcement (TPEn) uses bitmasks for efficient level-based freezing. Constant-time enforcement relative to DAG size.

8048.one_line_summary: Onchain key-value metadata store for ERC-721, ERC-1155, ERC-6909 tokens with optional Diamond Storage.
8048.notes: Supports parameterized keys per ERC-8119. Optional metadata contract reference via ERC-7930 interoperable addresses. ERC-721T profile reserves keys for agent metadata.

8049.one_line_summary: Contract-level onchain metadata with optional Diamond Storage for predictable storage locations.
8049.notes: Key-value store (string→bytes). Optional metadata hooks via ERC-8121. Diamond Storage namespace: 'erc8049.contract.metadata.storage'.

8054.one_line_summary: Checkpoint-based ERC-20 enabling efficient token forking to distribute new tokens to existing holders.
8054.notes: Forked tokens inherit balances from checkpoint via lazy loading. Zero-gas distribution to holders without airdrops/claims. Checkpoint nonce prevents reorg/MEV vulnerabilities.

8056.one_line_summary: ERC-20 extension with updatable multiplier for UI amounts enabling stock splits without minting.
8056.notes: Multiplier uses 18 decimals (1e18=1.0). Optional conversion and balances extensions. Separate UI functions preserve backward compatibility. Planned effective timestamp for delayed updates.

8063.one_line_summary: ERC-20 tokens representing group membership with threshold-based access control and tiered privileges.
8063.notes: Token balance = membership level. Applications define thresholds. Optional isMember() introspection. Any ERC-20 can be a Group. No minting/burning mandate.

8065.one_line_summary: Permissionless zero-knowledge wrapper enabling privacy for existing tokens via burn-and-remint flows.
8065.notes: Supports ERC-20, ERC-721, ERC-1155, ERC-6909. Relayer-enabled remint. Commitment schemes flexible (Merkle trees or accumulators). Dual workflows: ZWToken-aware and unaware.

8074.one_line_summary: Convention for self-describing structured data in bytes using 4-byte EIP-712 selectors and canonical wrapper.
8074.notes: Single-payload: selector + abi.encode(fields). Multi-payload: DataList(bytes[]) with selector 0xae74f986. Mirrors function selector pattern for compactness.

8084.one_line_summary: Standardized interface for zero-knowledge proof metadata discovery (circuit ID, version, keys, schemas).
8084.notes: Supports multiple proof systems (Groth16, Plonk, Halo2, zkSTARK, zkVM). Proof-system ID registry extensible. Event-based updates for indexers. Hash + URI pattern for integrity.

8085.one_line_summary: Dual-mode fungible tokens supporting transparent (ERC-20) and privacy (ZK-SNARK) modes with seamless conversion.
8085.notes: For new token deployments. toPrivate/toPublic conversions bridge modes. Supply invariant: totalSupply = public + privacy supply. Permissionless deployment.
